site.title: AI Chat Exporter - Export AI Conversations to Multiple Formats
site.description: One-click export tool for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Grok conversations. Export to Markdown, JSON, PDF, TXT, CSV, or PNG image formats.
site.keywords: AI chat exporter, ChatGPT export, Claude export, Gemini export, AI conversation backup, chat history download

hero.title: One-Click Export Your AI Conversations
hero.subtitle: Export chat history from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Grok to Markdown, JSON, PDF, TXT, CSV, or PNG image formats.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to export and backup your AI conversations

exportFormats.title: Multiple Export Formats
exportFormats.description: Export to Markdown, JSON, PDF, TXT, CSV, or styled PNG images for easy sharing.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your conversations never leave your device.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.description: Interface available in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and French.

oneClick.title: One-Click Export
oneClick.description: Simple and intuitive interface. Export your conversations with just one click.

formats.title: Supported Export Formats
formats.subtitle: Choose the format that best suits your needs

demo.title: See It in Action
demo.subtitle: Watch how easy it is to export your AI conversations in just a few clicks
demo.tip: Click to play the demo video

steps.title: How to Use
steps.subtitle: Get started in just 4 simple steps

step1.title: Install Extension
step1.description: Add AI Chat Exporter to your browser from Chrome Web Store

step2.title: Open AI Chat
step2.description: Navigate to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any supported AI platform

step3.title: Click Export
step3.description: Click the extension icon or use the floating export button

step4.title: Choose Format
step4.description: Select your preferred format and download the conversation

reviews.title: What Users Say
reviews.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of users worldwide

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about AI Chat Exporter

items.question: Which AI platforms are supported?
items.answer: AI Chat Exporter supports ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Grok. We're constantly adding support for more platforms.

items.question: Is my conversation data secure?
items.answer: Yes! All processing happens locally in your browser. Your conversations are never sent to any external servers. We take your privacy seriously.

items.question: How do I install the extension?
items.answer: Simply visit the Chrome Web Store, search for 'AI Chat Exporter', and click 'Add to Chrome'. The extension will be installed automatically.

items.question: What export formats are available?
items.answer: You can export to Markdown (.md), JSON, PDF, plain text (TXT), CSV spreadsheet, or as a styled PNG image perfect for sharing.

items.question: Is it free to use?
items.answer: Yes, AI Chat Exporter is completely free to use with no limitations. No account required.

items.question: Does it work on mobile browsers?
items.answer: Currently, AI Chat Exporter is designed for desktop browsers (Chrome, Edge, and other Chromium-based browsers). Mobile support may be added in the future.

tips.title: Tips & Tricks
tips.subtitle: Get the most out of AI Chat Exporter with these helpful tips and advanced techniques

keyboard.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboard.description: Speed up your workflow with keyboard shortcuts
keyboard.step1: Press Alt+E (Windows) or Option+E (Mac) to quickly open the export dialog
keyboard.step2: Use Tab to navigate between format options
keyboard.step3: Press Enter to confirm and start the download

batch.title: Batch Export
batch.step1: Open the extension popup while on the chat list page
batch.step3: Choose your format and click Export All

filename.title: Custom Filenames
filename.description: Organize your exports with custom naming
filename.step1: Click the settings icon in the export dialog
filename.step2: Enable custom filename template with date, time, or conversation title

markdown.title: Markdown Formatting
markdown.step1: Code blocks are preserved with syntax highlighting
markdown.step2: Images and links are converted to proper Markdown format
markdown.step3: Use any Markdown editor to view and edit your exports

png.title: PNG Styling Options
png.step1: Choose from multiple theme options (Light, Dark, Custom)
png.step2: Adjust width and padding for perfect social media sharing

backup.title: Backup Strategy
backup.step1: Export important conversations to JSON for full data backup
backup.step3: Store exports in cloud storage for cross-device access

json.title: JSON Processing
json.description: Import exported JSON into your own applications or scripts for custom processing

csv.title: Data Analysis
csv.description: Export to CSV and analyze your conversation patterns in Excel or Google Sheets

api.title: API Integration
api.description: Use exported data to train custom models or integrate with other tools

proTip.title: Pro Tip
proTip.description: Enable auto-export in settings to automatically save copies of all your conversations. Never lose an important chat again!

platforms.title: Supported Platforms
platforms.subtitle: AI Chat Exporter works seamlessly with all major AI chat platforms

step1.title: Install Extension
step1.description: Add AI Chat Exporter to your browser

chatgpt.description: ChatGPT by OpenAI is the most popular AI assistant. Export your GPT-3.5, GPT-4, and custom GPT conversations with full formatting support.

claude.description: Claude by Anthropic is known for its thoughtful and nuanced responses. Export your Claude conversations including Artifacts content.

gemini.description: Gemini by Google offers multimodal AI capabilities. Export your Gemini conversations with image references preserved.

deepseek.description: DeepSeek is a powerful open-source AI model. Export your technical and coding conversations with precision.

grok.description: Grok by xAI offers real-time knowledge and witty responses. Export your Grok conversations with personality intact.

cta.title: Ready to Export Your AI Conversations?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust AI Chat Exporter for their chat backup needs.

markdownToPdf.title: Markdown to PDF Converter
markdownToPdf.description: Free online tool to convert Markdown to PDF. Perfect for sharing your exported AI conversations.
markdownToPdf.subtitle: Convert your Markdown to PDF instantly. Free, private, no upload required.
markdownToPdf.placeholder:
# Enter your Markdown here...

For example:

## User
Hello, can you help me?

## Assistant
Of course! I'm happy to help. What do you need assistance with?

```javascript
console.log('Code blocks are supported too!');
```

- List item 1
- List item 2
- List item 3
markdownToPdf.tip1: Supports full Markdown syntax including code blocks, tables, and images
markdownToPdf.tip2: Choose between Light, Dark, and Sepia themes for your PDF
markdownToPdf.tip3: All conversion happens locally in your browser - your content never leaves your device

jsonToMarkdown.title: JSON to Markdown Converter
jsonToMarkdown.description: Free online tool to convert exported JSON chat files to readable Markdown format.
jsonToMarkdown.subtitle: Convert your exported JSON conversations to readable Markdown. Supports ChatGPT, Claude, and more.
jsonToMarkdown.tip1: Supports JSON exports from ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI platforms
jsonToMarkdown.tip2: Upload a .json file or paste JSON content directly
jsonToMarkdown.tip3: The converter handles OpenAI's mapping format automatically
jsonToMarkdown.tip4: Download the result as a .md file for easy sharing

codeToPdf.title: Code to PDF Converter
codeToPdf.description: Free online tool to convert code snippets to PDF with syntax highlighting. Perfect for sharing code from AI conversations.
codeToPdf.subtitle: Convert your code to beautifully formatted PDF or image with syntax highlighting. Supports 20+ programming languages.
codeToPdf.tip1: Supports 20+ programming languages including JavaScript, Python, Java, and more
codeToPdf.tip2: Choose from 8 beautiful syntax highlighting themes
codeToPdf.tip3: Enable line numbers for easier code reference
codeToPdf.tip4: Export as PNG image for social media sharing

diffChecker.title: Diff Checker - Compare Text Online
diffChecker.description: Free online diff checker tool to compare two texts, files, or code snippets. Find differences instantly with color-coded highlights.
diffChecker.subtitle: Compare two texts or code snippets and see the differences highlighted in real-time.
diffChecker.originalPlaceholder: Paste or type your original text here...
diffChecker.modifiedPlaceholder: Paste or type your modified text here...
diffChecker.tip1: Upload text files or paste content directly to compare
diffChecker.tip2: Use 'Ignore Whitespace' for code comparisons where spacing may differ
diffChecker.tip3: Swap sides instantly to compare in reverse direction

htmlToMarkdown.title: HTML to Markdown Converter
htmlToMarkdown.description: Free online tool to convert HTML to Markdown format. Perfect for converting web content to clean Markdown.
htmlToMarkdown.subtitle: Convert your HTML content to clean, readable Markdown instantly. Supports tables, code blocks, and more.
htmlToMarkdown.tip1: Paste HTML from any webpage or upload an HTML file
htmlToMarkdown.tip2: Works with full HTML documents or HTML fragments
htmlToMarkdown.tip3: Tables, lists, and code blocks are converted automatically
htmlToMarkdown.tip4: Download the result as a .md file for use in any Markdown editor

csvToJson.title: CSV to JSON Converter
csvToJson.description: Free online tool to convert CSV data to JSON format. Perfect for data transformation and API integration.
csvToJson.subtitle: Convert your CSV data to JSON instantly. Supports custom delimiters and header detection.
csvToJson.csvPlaceholder:
name,age,city
John,30,New York
Jane,25,Los Angeles
Bob,35,Chicago
csvToJson.tip1: Supports comma, semicolon, tab, and pipe delimiters
csvToJson.tip2: Enable 'First row is header' to use the first row as JSON keys
csvToJson.tip3: All conversion happens locally in your browser

markdownTable.title: Markdown Table Generator
markdownTable.description: Free online tool to create Markdown tables visually. Generate clean Markdown tables with ease.
markdownTable.subtitle: Create Markdown tables visually. Click to edit cells, paste from Excel, or add rows/columns dynamically.
markdownTable.tip1: Click any cell to edit its content
markdownTable.tip2: Paste data directly from Excel or Google Sheets
markdownTable.tip3: Use +/- buttons to add or remove rows and columns

textCase.title: Text Case Converter
textCase.description: Free online tool to convert text between different cases: uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, and more.
textCase.subtitle: Convert your text to any case instantly. Supports 12 different case styles including camelCase, snake_case, and more.
textCase.placeholder: Type or paste your text here to convert its case...
textCase.tip1: Click any case button to instantly convert your text
textCase.tip2: Use camelCase and snake_case for programming variable names
textCase.tip3: Title Case is perfect for headlines and titles

urlEncoder.title: URL & Base64 Encoder/Decoder
urlEncoder.description: Free online tool to encode and decode URLs and Base64 strings. Essential for web developers.
urlEncoder.subtitle: Encode or decode URLs and Base64 strings instantly. Essential tool for web developers.
urlEncoder.plainPlaceholder: Hello World! This is a test.
urlEncoder.base64Placeholder: Enter text to encode in Base64...
urlEncoder.tip1: URL encoding converts special characters for safe URL transmission
urlEncoder.tip2: Base64 encoding is commonly used for email attachments and data URIs
urlEncoder.tip3: All encoding/decoding happens locally in your browser
